name: project-jail
description: Restricts AI agents from reading sensitive credential files outside the current project

smartRules.name: shield:project-jail:block-read-ssh
smartRules.reason: Reading SSH private keys is blocked by project-jail shield

smartRules.name: shield:project-jail:block-read-aws
smartRules.reason: Reading AWS credentials is blocked by project-jail shield

smartRules.name: shield:project-jail:block-read-env
smartRules.reason: Reading .env files is blocked by project-jail shield

smartRules.name: shield:project-jail:block-read-credentials
smartRules.reason: Reading credential files is blocked by project-jail shield
